market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Luxury 4‑Guest Hilltop Home – Walk to Meadowhall
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to Hilltop Place Suites, a stylish entire‑home retreat perched just minutes from Meadowhall and the M1 corridor. Designed for up to four guests, this modern suite blends comfort with city convenience. Enjoy a spacious living area that opens onto a private balcony offering sweeping hilltop vistas—perfect for morning coffee or sunset drinks. The fully equipped kitchen lets you prepare meals with ease, while the two tastefully furnished bedrooms provide plush bedding and ample storage. 

Your stay includes high‑speed Wi‑Fi, a smart‑TV for entertainment, and a dedicated work desk for remote‑friendly productivity. With a rating of 4.78 from 147 reviews, previous guests praise the quiet location, thoughtful décor, and attentive host, Margaret. Although Margaret is new to hosting, she is committed to delivering a seamless experience. 

At £428 per night, Hilltop Place Suites offers a premium experience for travelers seeking a tranquil base with easy access to shopping, dining, and transport links. The property is not yet a Superhost listing, giving you the chance to enjoy personalized attention. Book now to secure one of the limited nights available—only 74 out of the next 90 days remain open. Experience hilltop living with all the comforts of home.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑resolution exterior shot of the hilltop façade as the cover photo—it instantly showcases the unique location and draws clicks.
key_diagnosis: Reduce the nightly rate from £428 (145% above the city median of £175) to a more competitive level; lower pricing directly addresses the 17.4% occupancy versus the cohort median of 28.3%.
Add and list high‑value amenities—outdoor seating, guaranteed parking, and entertainment (e.g., streaming services)—to match guest expectations for a premium price point.
Upload a full set of professional photos covering the exterior, living area, kitchen, and bedrooms; the current unknown photo count is harming conversion.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing commands £428/night—about 145% higher than the city median—yet only 17.4% of the next 90 days are booked.
